Deng Kai й„§еҮұ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Kai (й„§еҮұ)was born in Nan. Raised non-Chinese people to resist Sun Quan. Lost to Xie Jing and fled to Shu. Deng Kai was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
